generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure puts national security at risk? While some argue for open markets, experts warn that strategic autonomy in defense tech is crucial for deterrence. 'We can't afford to be caught off guard again,' says former Defense Secretary Adams. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
